mapper.select: SELECT U.*, A.LOGIN_TYPE AS loginType FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT A ON (U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) WHERE U.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET STATUS = CASE WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - LAST_LOGIN) >= 30 THEN 'H' ELSE STATUS END, LAST_LOGIN = CASE WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - LAST_LOGIN) < 30 THEN CURRENT_DATE WHEN LAST_LOGIN IS NULL THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE LAST_LOGIN END WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

UPDATE USERS SET USER_NAME = #{userName}, NICKNAME = #{nickName}, EMAIL = #{email},
ORIGIN_NAME = #{originName}, CHANGE_NAME = #{changeName},
ORIGIN_NAME = NULL, CHANGE_NAME = NULL,
STATUS = 'Y', LAST_LOGIN = CASE WHEN (CURRENT_DATE - LAST_LOGIN) >= 30 THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE LAST_LOGIN END WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.*, A.LOGIN_TYPE AS loginType FROM USERS U JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT A ON (U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) WHERE U.EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET LOCK_UNTIL = NULL, LOGIN_COUNT = 0 WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
